title: linum hirsutum subsp. bozdaghense
intro: Linum hirsutum subsp. bozdaghense, also known as Bozdag flax or Bozdag linseed, is a plant species belonging to the Linaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which make it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Bozdag linseed include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and protect against cardiovascular diseases. Bozdag linseed can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used as a dietary supplement, either in its raw form or after being processed into linseed oil.
